productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Solid Black Shorts
description: Composition Black cargo shorts made of 100% cotton, has a looped waistband with an elasticated back, a button and zipper closure, two insert pockets on the sides, two cargo pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, two cargo pants on the sides with buttoned flaps, distressed look brand name printed on the right leg and seal on the right back Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little brat ready for the outdoors with these black cargo shorts from palm tree. The wide elasticated waistband gives a great Fit, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. The rugged look and the distressed lettering adds to the outdoorsy vibe. Team this with tees and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.
